reviews.comment:
Es un buen lugar para hacer un alto en el camino, con buen servicio de bufet pero que a la noche no funciona. El servicio de combustible está abierto las 24 hs. Si tienen suerte podrán degustar una ensaimada sanpedrina.-
El lugar es seguro y los baños limpios.-

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place to stop along the way, with a good buffet service, although it's closed at night. The gas station is open 24 hours a day. If you're lucky, you might get to try a San Pedro-style ensaimada. The place is safe and the restrooms are clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnMTRXSFV3EAE
